message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first generate_bundle in ft diagnostic (tick 252)

Migrates the `ft diagnostic` CLI dispatch in `frankenterm/main.rs` to
the cx-first sibling `diagnostic::generate_bundle_with_cx`:

- Import line: `generate_bundle` → `generate_bundle_with_cx`
- L29055 call: `generate_bundle_with_cx(&diag_cx, &config, &layout, &storage, &opts)`
  where `diag_cx` resolves via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

The `_with_cx` variant threads the Cx through every internal storage
query (events, step logs, audit actions) and emits a `cx.checkpoint()`
before any I/O — so a cx-cancel at the CLI spawn boundary now cleanly
aborts a running `ft diagnostic` bundle-generation mid-stream rather than
completing the full multi-query scan before unwinding.

Legacy ambient `generate_bundle` retained in `diagnostic.rs` only for
test-mod callers (~7 sites in diagnostic.rs internal tests + 5 in
`tests/diagnostic_labruntime.rs`) which run in LabRuntime harnesses
where Cx-cancel semantics are tested via the `_with_cx` variant directly.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 66 (187-252).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 126 sites (125 before + 1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
